fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Entry No. that was created by the Posted Payment Reconciliation Journal.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the entry that was created by the posted payment reconciliation journal.

fields.name: ToUnapply
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry created by the posted payment reconciliation journal will be unapplied.

fields.name: ToReverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry created by the posted payment reconciliation journal will be reversed.
